title: The best-funded companies open the most phishing attachments
sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — The best-funded companies open the most phishing attachments
id: 53893c23-0b14-5d1e-9c41-127eec9adf7b
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to The best-funded companies open the most phishing attachments (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: PHISHING
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/The best-funded companies open the most phishing attachments
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/24
modified: 2026/07/24
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_email:
        EventID: 28
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - '.hta'
            - '.lnk'
            - '.iso'
            - '.vhd'
            - '.docm'
    selection_network:
        DestinationHostname|endswith:
            - '.xyz'
            - '.top'
            - '.pw'
            - '.cc'
        DestinationPort: 443
    condition: selection_email or selection_network
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate file downloads from CDNs
    - Business email with ISO attachments
level: medium
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX The best-funded companies open the most phishing attachments Exploitation Attempt - PHISHING"; flow:established,to_server; content:".hta"; nocase; http.uri; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4239923; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-24, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
_notice: Detection rules require PRO subscription. Subscribe at intel.cyberdudebivash.com/upgrade.html
